It's cold. The sensation comes to you, slowly, like a trickle. It starts at your skin, and you can mildly feel it in the back of your mind, before it begins to creep deeper and deeper. It seeps through into your muscles, and deeper to your skin. You soon begin to feel it in your bones, and it's not pleasant. Slowly, you get up, and look around you. You're in a forest, and you appear to be naked. The wind is biting and the ground is wet and cold. It's night time, and the moon shines overhead. You're not sure how you got here. As you begin to move, you can see something underneath your body and your feet. You look down, and you can see shards of glass strewn all over the floor. Large shards lay in pieces, sprinkled lightly with the dust of of smaller pieces of glass. You lean forward and take one in your hand, looking down at a larger shard of glass. It doesn't appear to be glass at all, but some sort of one-way mirror. You turn it over in your hands, and you're greeted by your reflection. It seems off, but the entire thing is at least a little familiar to you. You can't even seem to remember your own name, but your face looks right. your name is $name. Satisfied, you stare down at your own reflection, tracing the outline of your own features with a finger. You're young, that much is clear, and at the very least underage. You're definitely a boy, too. Your face looks... (link: "Canine")[(set:$species to "Canine")(set:$an to "a")(set:$nose to "muzzle")(goto:"CC")] in nature, with a prominent snout and wet nose. Pairs of fangs sit behind thin lips, and two large ears stick out of your head. (link: "Feline")[(set:$species to "Feline")(set:$an to "a")(set:$nose to "nose")(goto:"CF")] in nature, with a short snout and small nose. Whiskers stick out of your head, and you have a pair of large ears. Your eyes are sharp and vigilant. (link: "Vulpine")[(set:$species to "Fox")(set:$an to "a")(set:$nose to "muzzle")(goto:"CV")] in nature. Much like a canine, you have a prominent muzzle, but you are leaner, more agile, with a rich bushy tail. (link: "Avian")[(set:$species to "Avian")(set:$an to "an")(set:$nose to "beak")(goto:"CA")] in nature, with a sharp, pronounced beak and feathers covering your primarily circular head. A tuft sits on top of your head, curling backwards to give your head some definition. (link: "Reptillian")[(set:$species to "Reptile")(set:$an to "a")(set:$nose to "snout")(goto:"CR")] in nature, with a prominent snout and nostrils. Your head is covered in scales, and two small horns poke out either side of your head. (link: "Draconic")[(set:$species to "Dragon")(set:$an to "a")(set:$nose to "snout")(goto:"CD")] in nature. This is visibly different from Reptiles, as you have protruding horns and a large pair of wingsNow that you're certain you're a Canine, you give your features a more complex look-over, despite the dingy little mirror in your hands. You have a rather pointed snout and a lovely wet nose, and two large ears on your head that can hear all sounds. Your fur is delicately fluffy, albeit a bit damp from the current weather, and your feet both sport 4 toes on each. You have a large tail similar to that of a wolf. You're fairly confident in how you move, thankfully. You run a hand over your fur, and realise the colour is...(set:$skin to "fur")(set:$skined to "furred") (link:"A rich, natural mixture of brown and cream.")[(set:$sc to "natural")(goto:"Age")] (link:"A dark, midnight black, from head to toe.")[(set:$sc to "black")(goto:"Age")] (link:"A fluffy, pristine white.")[(set:$sc to "white")(goto:"Age")] (link:"A dull mixture of grey.")[(set:$sc to "grey")(goto:"Age")]Now that you're certain you're a Feline, you give your features a more complex look-over, despite the dingy little mirror in your hands. You have a short, rounded 'snout', with a smaller nose sitting between your eyes. Your feet both sport 4 toes on each, and you have a large tail that remains all one singular width all the way down. As you move, you feel an aura of grace around you. The feathers run to your knees, where they round off completely to reveal scaled legs, ending in 3-toed feet with talons, along with a back talon on your heel. You have a rounded, generic beak and beady eyes. The first thing you notice is that your body is completely covered in scales, from your round head and pointed, rounded snout, all the way down your body. You have 5 fingers on each hand, including the thumb, and plantigrade feet that both end in 3 toes, each which sport a claw. You think the colour is...(set:$skin to "scales")(set:$skined to "scaled") (link:"A dark mixture of greens, like a standard lizard.")[(set:$sc to "green")(goto:"Age")] (link:"A bright white, though more like a light grey.")[(set:$sc to "white")(goto:"Age")] (link:"Dark and ashen, with a hint of purple.")[(set:$sc to "purple")(goto:"Age")] (link:"A grubby, dirty mixture of browns")[(set:$sc to "brown")(goto:"Age")]Now that you're certain you're a Dragon, of sorts, you give your features a more complex look-over, despite the dingy little mirror in your hands. You stretch them out and they feel powerful, but definitely underdeveloped, or you at least assume so. In addition, you have two horns on your head that appear rather small. You have 5 fingers, and 3 toes. You are $an $species, with $sc coloured $skin. You run a hand over your features and decide to look a little closer. You shuffle away from the mirror a little and try to examine yourself, guaging your height. You're not exactly an expert, but your face is definitely young, and you definitely feel full of spirit. You guess that you're about... (link:"3 and a half foot tall.")[(set:$h to 3.5)(goto:"Hair")] (link:"4 foot tall.")[(set:$h to 4)(goto:"Hair")] (link:"4 and a half foot tall.")[(set:$h to 4.5)(goto:"Hair")] (link:"5 foot tall.")[(set:$h to 5)(goto:"Hair")] (if:$age is 10 or 11)[You cannot be 5 and a half foot at your age.](else:)[(link:"5 and a half foot tall.")[(set:$h to 5.5)(goto:"Hair")]] (if:$age is 10 or 11)[You cannot be 6 foot at your age.](else:)[(link:"6 foot tall.")[(set:$h to 6)(goto:"Hair")]]You have $ec eyes, and you stare deep into them for a moment. It also seems you could have (if:$species is "Canine")[(link:"a knotted member, with sheath.")[(set:$cock to "canine")(set:$cocke to "knot")(set:$fcock to "sheath")(goto:"DickL")]](elseif:$species is "Fox")[(link:"a knotted member, with sheath.")[(set:$cock to "fox")(set:$fcock to "sheath")(set:$cocke to "knot")(goto:"DickL")]](elseif:$species is "Feline")[(link:"a barbed member, with sheath.")[(set:$cock to "feline")(set:$cocke to "barbs")(set:$fcock to "sheath")(goto:"DickL")]](elseif:$species is "Avian")[(link:"a cloaca, with a phallus.")[(set:$cock to "avian")(set:$cocke to "member")(set:$fcock to "cloaca")(goto:"DickL")]](elseif:$species is "Reptile")[(link:"a ridged, exotic member, with a slit.")[(set:$cock to "reptillian")(set:$cocke to "member")(set:$fcock to "slit")(goto:"DickL")]](elseif:$species is "Dragon")[(link:"an exotic, ribbed cock, with a knot and a slit.")[(set:$cock to "dragon")(set:$cocke to "knot")(set:$fcock to "slit")(goto:"DickL")]]You stare down at your $fcock, and slowly slide your fingers along it, feeling a pleasure building up within your loins. It makes your entire body tingle and a shudder runs up your spine as you begin to get aroused. You're soon full mast, and your hand wraps around your cock, firmly groping and rubbing, before you examine it in the mirror. You have a $cock member, and by all accounts, you think it's impressive. You wager it's about... (link:"3 inches long.")[(set:$dl to 3)(goto:"CharacterFinish")] (link:"4 inches long.")[(set:$dl to 4)(goto:"CharacterFinish")] (link:"5 inches long.")[(set:$dl to 5)(goto:"CharacterFinish")] (link:"6 inches long.")[(set:$dl to 6)(goto:"CharacterFinish")]You are $h foot tall. You assume that's right, but then again, you don't have anything to measure yourself by. You run a hand up to your head and slide your hand over it. You appear to have... (link:"Short length hair.")[(set:$hl to "short")(set:$hair to "hair")(goto:"HairC")] (link:"Medium length hair.")[(set:$hl to "medium")(set:$hair to "hair")(goto:"HairC")] (link:"Long length hair.")[(set:$hl to "long")(set:$hair to "hair")(goto:"HairC")] (link:"Incredibly Long length hair.")[(set:$hl to "very long")(set:$hair to "hair")(goto:"HairC")] (link:"Nothing, except your $skin.")[(set:$hl to $skin)(set:$hc to $sc)(set:$hair to $skin)(goto:"Eye")]You have $hl length hair, and your run your hands through it, satisfied at how nice it feels. You manage to make out the colour through the mirror, and guess it to be... (link:"A sandy blonde.")[(set:$hc to "sandy blonde")(goto:"Eye")] (link:"A dark brown.")[(set:$hc to "dark brown")(goto:"Eye")] (link:"A jet black.")[(set:$hc to "black")(goto:"Eye")] (link:"A bright, platinum blonde, bordering on white.")[(set:$hc to "white")(goto:"Eye")] (link:"A vibrant red.")[(set:$hc to "red")(goto:"Eye")] Satisfied in your entirety, you now look over yourself one more time. Your name is $name. You are $an $species, and you are $age years old, and pretty underage. You have $sc $skin, and you are $h foot tall, with beautiful $ec eyes. You have (if:$hl is $skin)[$skin atop your head.](else:)[$hc $hl length hair.] Your body is relatively $body in form, and between your legs is a nice $fcock, which becomes a tasty $dl inch, $cock member. You're fairly confident at this point that this is you, and you finally pluck up the courage to get to your feet. Slowly, you look around you. [[Continue.->Intro2]]The forest is cold and silent, but for the rustling of the leaves in the wind. You can feel the chill on your $skin, and you desperately need to seek shelter before you freeze to death. You slowly step around the shards of glass and head in a random direction, hoping you might find some sort of civilisation. When trying to recall where you were last, nothing comes to mind, as if your entire life before now has been wiped from memory. Nothing seems to trigger any sort of memory recovery: everything around you seems unfamiliar. As you walk, you hear a rustling in the bushes. You're not sure what it is: it could be a predator, it could be an ally seeking to help you. Either way, you're scared. But, before you can even think about what to do, the rustling grows louder, and under the moonlight, a figure appears. It's a quadraped, for sure, and you manage to see what it is exactly when it finally steps under the moonlight. It's a Wolf, or at least very similar. It's a dog, at the very least, with pristine white fur, and deep blue eyes that seem to house a great deal of wisdom. You watch as it opens its mouth. |Kami>["Hello."] (link:"Say hello in return.")[(set:$introchoice to 1)(goto:"Intro3")] (link:"Scream in terror.")[(set:$introchoice to 2)(goto:"Intro3")](if:$introchoice is 1)[You cautiously greet the talking Wolf, and it bows its head to you in a gesture of respect. You don't know whether to reach forward and pet it, or back off.](elseif:$introchoice is 2)[The Wolf visibly winches as your scream at the top of your lungs, and its ears fall flat to it's head. A low growl escapes it's throat and it shakes its head. ["Christ, control yourself,"]<Kami| It snaps out rather bluntly, and you snap your mouth shut. |Kami>["...Anyway..."]] The Wolf takes a small bow, and you're sort of inclined to do the same, but you're too confused to return it. The creature doesn't seem to mind. ["My apologies if I might have startled you, Master. I couldn't find you after the awakening."]<Kami| Wait, did it just call you Master? You quizzically ask what it's referring to, and it tilts its head at you, confused as to how, and why, you don't seem to know. |Kami>["There must have been a problem with the Awakening,"] It guessed, before stepping slightly closer. ["No matter. My name is Kami, your loyal Servant for as long as you hold the mantle of Magister."]<Kami| So many questions were swimming through your mind. You don't even know where to begin. [["Magister?"->Intro3c1]] [["You're my Servant?"->Intro3c2]] [["Where am I?"->Intro3c3]]You have no idea what a 'Magister' is, but you're hoping the Dog can provide some sort of explanation. Once you ask, he seems eager to answer. |Kami>["A Magister, sir. Your title grants you dominion over all animals, and the perks that come with it."] That just left you with more questions to ask, but the Wolf bows his head and continues. |Kami>["All animals, great and small, have to bow to your instructions. You can consider it like mind control if you like, sire. However, the larger the creature, the harder it is to get them to obey. In addition, this power comes at a cost: they all wish to fornicate with you, Master."] Fornicate? You vaguely realise the word means sex, but why on earth would animals want to have sex with you? Before you can ask, he answers it again. |Kami>["The blessing is your control over them, Master, but the curse is the pheromones and Magic you release as a result. It has an effect on animals, making them want you."] This is wrong. You're just a child. Kami seems to notice your distress, and lowers his head, apologetic. You still have questions, but you're also frightened. This Dog seems nice. Maybe he can help. [["You're my Servant?"->Intro3c2]] [["Where am I?"->Intro3c3]] [["I need to get out of here."->Intro3c4]] You don't seem to understand why, or how, this Wolf has come to serve you, nor why it can talk. There are many questions about your 'guide' that are left unanswered, so you start small. You ask why it has to serve you. |Kami>["Once you were blessed as a Magister, the Great Forest God, Pan, knew you would need a guide to help you explore your gifts and get through life. He knew you would have trouble. He assigned me to you and gifted me the power of speech, so that I may be able to help you on your journey."] You're not quite sure what this 'journey' is that he's speaking of, but you can vaguely understand why someone would give you a guide, after chucking you in the middle of nowhere. You ask the Wolf if he was always able to speak. |Kami>["All animals, great and small, share some level of intelligence, Master. I have served Pan for many years, but I was never allowed to speak until recently, shortly after your Awakening."] You quickly ask what the Awakening was, before you forget. |Kami>["You went through a ritual with Pan, Master, where you were joined in holy coitus with our great lord. In exchange, he awakened your body to the latent abilities of a Magister. This is your birthright, Sire."] Somehow, you don't feel any better. [["Magister?"->Intro3c1]] [["Where am I?"->Intro3c3]] [["I need to get out of here."->Intro3c4]]You consider it a good idea to ask where on Earth you are. |Kami>["You are in the Forest of Madness, Master, approximately 3 miles south of the Reliquim's Capital, and the fabled Silver Spire."] Reliquim. You remember the name, and the knowledge of your world comes back to you, slowly. Reliquim is the Western continent on an oval-shaped, vast island known as Orbath. Adplagam lies to the East, and in the center of the continent is a vast ocean of water, where the Council of Wizards is rumored to reside. That much you can remember, but you have no idea where you heralded from, nor how you got here, or who your parents are. |Kami>["If we continue North, we should make it to the Capital in record time, Master. It might be a good idea that we go soon: you do appear rather pale."] That much was obvious: you were cold and you were hungry. You desperately needed to get moving. Somehow, you don't feel too embarrassed about being naked in front of Kami, presumably because you're both not wearing clothes. However, there are still more questions that Kami might be able to answer. [["Magister?"->Intro3c1]] [["You're my Servant?"->Intro3c2]] [["Okay, let's get moving."->Intro3c4]]It's high time you finally got moving. The cold was beginning to set in too much, and your teeth were starting to chatter. Kami is content to lead the way, and you're happy for him to do so. It's nice to have someone guiding you. You feel as though you might have never made it to civilisation on your own. As you walk, you can't help but drift your eyes to Kami's backside. Part of you knows it's wrong, but your eyes continued to linger on his rump, watching his tail sway this way and that. As he hops over small branches and roots, you occasionally catch a glimpse of his tight asshole. Otherwise, you're often greeted to the sight of his plump, swaying balls that waft to and fro with each trot. Up ahead, you can see the trees beginning to thin, and that can only mean you're getting closer to the edge of the Forest. It looks like you're going to make it out, and you're glad. Both you and Kami wander past the trees and finally step out next to what seems to be a trade route. You can see a beaten path right in front of you, travelling from the left to the right, or perhaps the other way around. Past that are nothing but rolling plains for what seems to be miles. [[Regardless, you keep moving.->Intro4]]You've been walking for what feels like hours. Kami seems to show no signs of tiring, but your strength is beginning to fail you. You're not sure if you can keep going. Just when you're about to give up, you see something in the distance. It looks like a light, or maybe even a fire. You're filled with a renewed vigor, and you clamber forwards, hoping to find something, any sort of shelter. Kami seems unsure, and falls back a little as you get close. You wander towards the light and notice that it's a campfire, and you hope there might be a traveller who could lend you some clothes. As you get closer, you spot people: not one, but many. They seem to be a band of people, and you start to falter. Are they friend or foe? "Well, what do we have here? What is it, $an $species?" One of the men chuckles loudly, and takes a step forward. He seems to be dressed in armor, and there a sword in a scabbard at his hip. That was enough to give you some cause for concern, let nevermind the tone. "Guys. Leave the boy be, can't you see he's scared?" Someone spoke up, and the group parted to reveal a relatively well-built, armored man. He seemed to be an Avian, and his feathers were slightly dirty. He stepped forward towards you and crouched down. [["Who are you?"->Intro5]] "Killian. I'm the leader of these arseholes." "I resent that, Boss." Someone spoke up from the back, and there was a murmur of laughter. "Pay them no mind. They clearly didn't realise you were in trouble. You look cold: do you need some clothes?" Shakily, you nod. You're not sure if you can trust this 'Killian', but he seems nice enough. The group stiffen up and draw their weapons rather suddenly, and you're not sure why at first. You quickly realise it's because of Kami, who must have finally caught up to you. "...This Wolf. Is it yours?" One of the men demanded, and you quickly nod in response. They relax a little. Clearly, the idea of a domesticated Wolf is not uncommon amongst them. Killian gestures to you, and you step forwards with him, moving through the crowd of people. You can feel some of them staring a little too closely at you, and you try your best to cover yourself up. "I don't have much your size, but this should do." Killian hands you a small cloth tunic, with underwear, and a loose linen jacket, as well as a pair of simple cloth shorts that do their best to cover your legs. It should be enough to keep you warm. [[Continue->Intro6]]You had no idea why this man was being so nice, but you were definitely thankful for it. With the tunic and jacket on, you were already beginning to warm up a little, and you rubbed your hands together near the heat of the fire. Killian took a seat from not too far away and leant back, staring over at you. "You seem relatively capable for a boy your age." Though how he could say that, you weren't certain. You hadn't displayed any prowess, but maybe it was because of Kami, who sat silently beside you. "You're free to join us. Camp with us...whatever, at least for the night. You can be away by the morning, if you wish." You tell him you'll think it over, as it seems like a wise choice. You can't say with any certainty whether it's a good idea to be palling around with bandits, especially with the 'destiny' that Kami apparently seems to think you have. Everyone's beginning to bed down, but some are patrolling around to make sure they aren't ambushed. You move to sit on your own, and Kami moves to sit beside you. You're tired, but you feel as if you couldn't sleep well, even if you tried. But, maybe you should. [[Talk to Kami.->Kami1]] [[Get some sleep.->Intro7]]You turn to Kami, and he tilts his head toward you. He doesn't say a word, and you begin to think you've gone insane, wondering whether he can speak at all. |Kami>["How can I help, Master?"] And then, he finally speaks. You blow a small sigh of relief, and think of what to ask him. [["Should we trust Killian?"->Kami1c1]] [["Can other people hear you speak?"->Kami1c2]] [["What are my 'perks'? How do I use them?"->Kami1c3]] [[Maybe you should just go to sleep.->Intro7]]It's time to finally get some sleep. You slowly yawn and lay your body down, sighing and looking up at the night sky. You roll onto your side, facing the Wolf, who stares at you with his ocean blue eyes. Slowly, Kami settles down, rolling onto his side and pointing his back towards you. Instinctively, you spoon the dog, putting an arm around him and cuddling into his fur. You can feel his naturally quick heartbeat, and his fur feels so delicately smooth to the touch. The warmth is soothing. If anything, it puts your mind at ease, at least for a while. You feel sleep eventually take you. Your dreams are riddled with a variety of questions, ones you can't answer or refuse to answer. None of it makes sense, and by the time you wake up, you can't remember any of it. The sun is the first thing you see, and you're thankfully not blinded. It's definitely a lot warmer than it was last night, and it's incredibly summery: the ground is dry under your feet and the heat on your skin is soothing. As you wake, you notice a number of things. Firstly, you're certain something had been touching you in the night: your jacket is slightly looser on your body then you remember, but nothing else is amiss. Kami sits up the minute you pull away from him, and it seems a number of bandits are packing up. "Glad to see you're awake. We're heading out." Killian appears to your left, a smile on his beak. [["Where?"->Intro8]]You're unsure about Killian, and the second you ask Kami, he seems to share the same fears. |Kami>["I can't pertain to know much about people, Master $name, but Bandits and Marauders have never been kind folk. He might seem nice, but what's to say there is no ulterior motive?"] Kami was right, of course, and that made the decision all the more harder. Would Killian really let you go after you woke up in the morning, or would you awake to find yourself in chains? The fear of the unknown was eating away at you. You'd just have to bite the bullet and see what happens. [["Can other people hear you speak?"->Kami1c2]] [["What are my 'perks'? How do I use them?"->Kami1c3]] [[Maybe you should just go to sleep.->Intro7]]Kami was awfully silent amongst the bandits. Now you're worried that Kami is all in your head, and he's simply talking into your mind. You think it best to ask if you're going nuts. |Kami>["Of course not, Sire. But...a talking Wolf, amongst Bandits? They'd either skin me for good luck, or sell me to the nearest bazaar."] Kami was definitely a lot smarter than you. You quickly apologise, and Kami slides his nose along your side encouragingly. [["Should we trust Killian?"->Kami1c1]] [["What are my 'perks'? How do I use them?"->Kami1c3]] [[Maybe you should just go to sleep.->Intro7]]You remember that Kami mentioned some sort of special power you had over Animals, but you had no idea how to invoke this special kind of magic. You ask Kami about it, and he bows his head. |Kami>["I'm not privy to the intricate details...but apparently, you will learn them over time, Master. That is what our blessed Lord intended."] Well, that was vague. Regardless, you press a bit further, wondering if you can do any other kind of magic. |Kami>["All people versed in the Arcane arts, no matter what specialty, are able to do at least the most basic magical acts. You should be able to do the same, Master."] That was comforting. Maybe you should shoot a fireball in a couple of years time. [["Should we trust Killian?"->Kami1c1]] [["Can other people hear you speak?"->Kami1c2]] [[Maybe you should just go to sleep.->Intro7]]"To Holstein. The capital. You really don't know that much, do you? What, were you raised by a farmhand?" Killian asked with a little teasing tone, and he could tell by your expression that it was a touchy subject. "Forget I asked. Holstein is Reliquim's capital and home to the Silver Spire, the headquarters of the Iron Empire and it's military corps." He explained loosely. You wonder why bandits would want to stay away from the military, and you hesitantly ask, just to know the answer. Killian seems amused. "We're not Bandits. We're mercenaries for hire," He assured you. "We travel to the capital for work. Now, uh...my men aren't comfortable with a kid in our troop. It seems only fair to escort you to the capital, but you're on your own after that." That seemed fair enough to you. [[To the Capital.->Intro9]]The travel was relatively short, in the grand scheme of things. Moving as a pack of people wasn't all that bad, and you can't help but feel oddly safe amongst all these people. You're sure if anyone attacked, you'd be aided. 3 miles wasn't as long as you had first thought, and the sun still beamed overhead as you rounded the hill and saw the capital in sight. The view was enough to make your jaw drop. A long, winding path lead down to a walled city that seemed incredibly large, and bang in the center was a tall, spire, thin and rounded all the way up to the very top. You watch in awe as a massive Gryphon flies overhead and circles around to the capital, landing on the Spire's tip. You could just make it out from the distance you were at. "Impressive, is it not? This is Holstein, the busiest city in all of Orbath." Killian walked beside you, gesturing to the grand city and patting you on the shoulder. "I'm sure you'll have a great life, kid." He assured him, and you and the party of mercenaries slowly make your way down to the capital. Once you reach the gate, the guards step aside and let you in without questioning you, and Kami seems to be allowed to follow, too. [[Continue.->Intro10]]"This is where we part ways." Killian almost looks sad to see you go, but you were happy to have to help, for what it was worth. You apologised to him, and said you had nothing to give him in thanks. He seemed to not mind. "I'll consider your happy, innocent smile my reward enough. We were coming this way anyway, and who else was going to fit in those clothes?" He tugged at your tunic for a moment, before hearing his men calling for him. "Also, here. Some coins, for your travels." Killian deposited a small bag of coins in your hand, and you thank him. With a small salute, Killian wanders back towards his party, and you watch him go. ["Well. Maybe there are good people in the world."]<Kami| Kami remarks beside you, and you smile down at the Wolf, before looking around you. You're standing in a massive, expansive courtyard, the hub for adventurers and travellers alike. A beautiful marble fountain sits in the center that must span at least 10 metres in diameter, with seating all the way around the outside. Various mercenaries sit along the rim, talking to one-another, and occasionally sparring. It seems busy, but you're certain you can find some answers, as well as a life here. [[Continue.->TheBeginning]](if:$DN is "day")[You're standing right in the middle of Holstein, Reliquim's capital. People wander back and forth, and overhead, the sun beams down, lighting up the tall, impressive silver spire. It is currently $DN time. There are a number of places you can go from here.](elseif:$DN is "night")[You're standing right in the middle of Holstein's busiest square, in Reliquim's capital. The moon shines up above, and the Silver Spire gleams from it's gaze. The place is eeriely quiet, with few people making their way back and forth. You should be careful. It is currently $DN time. There are a number of places you can go from here.] [[Go to the Inn.->HubInn]] [[Head towards the large Fountain.->HubFount]] [[Go to the Market.->HubMarket]] (if:(history:) contains "HolsteinTailor7")[[[Visit Soir at the Tailor's Shop.->HolsteinTailor]]](else:)[[[Go to the Tailor.->HolsteinTailor]]] [[Go to the Spire.->HubSpire]] (if:$DN is "day")[[[Check out the Back Streets.->Alley1D]]](elseif:$DN is "night")[[[Check out the Back Streets.->Alley1N]]] (if:$MQ1D is 1)[[[Hire a Carriage.->Carriages]]](else:)[<!--Do Nothing--!>] (if:$MisfitBU is true)[(if:$FiendF is true)[[[Seek out Fiend.->FiendSingle]]](elseif:$FiendF is false)[<!--Do Nothing--!>]](elseif:$MisfitBU is false)[<!--Do Nothing--!>]Welcome to 'Way of the Beastmaster'. Here, you can choose to start a new game, or load a previous save game. [[New Game.->Intro1]] |LoadGame>[Load Game.](click:?LoadGame)[(show:?LoadSlots)] |LoadSlots)[(link: "Load Save Slot A.")[(load-game: "A")] (link: "Load Save Slot B.")[(load-game: "B")] (link: "Load Save Slot C.")[(load-game: "C")]] //Note: This is an Adult interactive story. You must be over the age of 18 to play.// //Current Version: **0.41**// - - |PN>[Click here to view the patch notes.](click:?PN)[(show:?PatchNotes)] //A big thank you to LupusDaemon, Huzz, Endelphia, Chopper, SpazzleDusky, Riggles Wiggles, Jdrednaz, Commander Wilhelm and Shorty for playtesting this version, and a big thank you to everyone for supporting it! <3// If you enjoyed this game and wish to support its development, you can donate directly to my (link:"Ko-fi page.")[Ko-fi page.(open-url:'https://ko-fi.com/birdpup')] |PatchNotes)[<div class='img-container-pn'>General * Relationship hubs have been added. ** Relationships are available for **Wyatt, Hans, and Misfit.** ** For now, only **Misfit** is fully fleshed out. Sorry. * A main quest has been added. Find it at Scarhaven. * RPG Statistics for Kami have been added. ** You can find detailed statistic at any Inn or resting place. * Added a new hub town: The Isle of Dragons. ** Added 6 new sex scenes and 4 new notable characters. ** Added 2 new spells to be learned. ** You can access this new area through a special quest in Scarhaven. * A scene for the playtesting contest winner has been added. ** //Find it at Holstein's Hub.// * Added a sidebar for your inventory. ** //Known Issue: Clicking too many inventory items will have it roll off the screen. To circumvent this, go out and back into your inventory.// * You now have a Spell book to view your learned spells. * Multiple Save Slots are now available. (//1->3//) * Added a secret sex scene. //Good luck finding it!// * Added a Heart Ring item to view your curent relationship status. Bug Fixes ** Fixed an issue where Kami's text was too bolded on his equipment passage. ** Fixed an issue where Hans would continually introduce himself. ** Fixed an issue where Dillan kept introducing himself. ** Fixed several issues that users encountered. ** Fixed several spelling errors.</div> ](enchant:?i, (text-style:'italic'))(if:$innvisited is false)[You make your way onwards towards a rustic, spacious-looking Inn not too far from the city's main centre. With a keen interest, you peer up at the sign above, reading the words |i>['The Cock and Pig Inn']. You take a step inside, and see what lies beyond. You and Kami stand in one of the busiest establishments you've ever seen. Women dressed in tight outfits wander left and right, holding jugs of ale and mead as they pass them through to loud, rowdy citizens and adventurers scattered across a vast number of tables. |Kami>["Why are we here again?"] Kami promptly whispered, looking considerably uncomfortable with the sheer amount of people wandering around. You're thinking the same thing, too: why on Earth did you come here? Standing across from you is the counter, and you could presumably book a night at the Inn if you had the coin for it. Not too far from that on the left hand side is a large bounty board, strewn with fliers and pieces of parchment, presumably filled with quests that require an undertaking. [[Rent a room for the $DN.->InnStay]] [[Check the Bounty Board.->InnQuests]] [[Head back outside.->Hub]](set:$innvisited to true)](else:)[You're back at the Inn. God, it's as busy as ever, no matter what time of the day it is. People wander left and right and just about get in your way, but you're not too bothered. Kami gives you a brief, sour look, before you scan amongst the various residents. [[Rent a room for the $DN.->InnStay]] [[Check the Bounty Board.->InnQuests]] [[Head back outside.->Hub]]](if:$MarketV is false)[You make your way towards the Market. You've never been there before, and it would be interesting to see what's there. (if:$DN is "day")[The Marketplace has got to be even busier than the Square's Fountain, you expect. People wander to and fro, moving back and forth in droves, and you struggle to make your way through the crowd. The Marketplace appears to be one long lap, primarily. There is a sizeable walkway that goes around in a complete square until you eventually end up back where you came from. Stalls line the path left and right, with an island of them in the middle, and the rest around the outside, next to residential houses. All of them are selling a variety of things, from clothes and magical items, to herbs and remedies. You notice rather quickly that a lot of people don't seem to buy much, and instead browse. That seems to invoke a certain desperation in the sellers that are sitting behind the stalls. Further down, at the far end of the marketplace, is a small path leading off to a small seating area, and it appears that that's the main grounds for travelling peddlers, as you can spot numerous people with massive rucksacks selling to people who go there. Perhaps you might find something worth your while here, but you know not to spend too much gold...(set:$MarketV to true)(set:$PeddlerV to false) [[Check out the stall selling Magical Items.->MarkMagic]] [[Check out the stall selling Herbs.->MarkHerb]] [[Approach the travelling Peddlers.->MarkPed]] [[Head back.->Hub]]](elseif:$DN is "night")[Alas, it's $DN time, and it appears the marketplace is closed until the morning. |Kami>["Perhaps we should go and rest for now, and return when the sun is up, Master."] Kami suggests, and you know he's right. The two of you make your way back. [[Head back.->Hub]]]](elseif:$MarketV is true)[You head towards the Marketplace, aiming to buy some goods and maybe sell some things. (if:$DN is "day")[It's as busy as ever. You make your way through the bustling crowd of people and search the stalls for something you want. Kami quickly follows along behind, not wanting to be separated from you. [[Check out the stall selling Magical Items.->MarkMagic]] [[Check out the stall selling Herbs.->MarkHerb]] [[Approach the travelling Peddlers.->MarkPed]] [[Head back.->Hub]]](elseif:$DN is "night")[The Marketplace is closed. That's unsurprising, considering everyone's gone home for the day. |Kami>["We should come back in the morning."] Kami's right. You turn around and head back. [[Leave.->Hub]]]](if: (history:) contains "Wyatt2c4")[Despite Wyatt's warnings to stay away from the Spire, your curiosity gets the better of you, and you make your way past the Square towards it.](else:)[Your curiosity of the Spire and the way it looms overhead ultimately gets the better of you. Despite every fibre of your being warning you to stay away, you wander past the Square and make your way towards it.] Reluctantly, Kami follows you, though it's clear he's not enthused. The path to the Spire was simple. It was a single, straight cobblestone path from the Square straight to the Spire's drawbridge. Presumably, this is for ease of access for dignitaries to make their way to the Spire without any twisting, winding roads, but strategists would have pointed out that how flawed this was, making them open to attack. The closer you get, the more you notice guards. They seem to be posted at every other building you pass, getting more and more frequent as you near the spire. Eventually, the drawbridge is in sight, and you stop to stare up at the looming Spire overhead. "The fuck do you think you're doing?" You're startled by a guard glaring down at you, spear in hand. You try to stammer out some sort of explanation, but he doesn't care. "Get the fuck out of here." He speaks simply, with a great deal of intimidation, stepping forwards with his grip tightening on his spear. You don't need telling twice. You turn and run, and Kami quickly follows you. [[Leave.->Hub]]You turn to Kami and talk to him. |Kami>["Hello, Master $name. How can I be of assistance?"] (if:$DinusI is false)[<!--Do nothing--!>](elseif:$DinusI is true)[|DinusI>[Will I end up like that Rogue Warlock Dinus spoke about?]] (if:$MisfitF is false)[<!--Do Nothing--!>](elseif:$MisfitF is true)[|MisfitF>[Are you mad that I have sex with strangers?]] (if:$inv contains "Magister's Dirk")[|Dirk>[What is the Magister's Dirk?]](else:)[<!--Do nothing--!>] (if:$Single is true)[<!--Do Nothing--!>](elseif:$Single is false)[|Rela>[What do you think of $Relationship?]] |Pet>[I'm glad you're here with me.] (if:(history:) contains "IoDHub")[|IOD>[What do you think of the Isle of Dragons?]](else:)[<!--Do nothing--!>] { (if:$DinusI is true)[(clickreplace:?DinusI)[|Kami>["You won't, Master. That Rogue warlock was an addict to Magic, of the highest order. Such a thing is a brutal addiction to have. It corrodes the mind. You are a strong boy, and a loving Master. You'll never be like him."]]](elseif:$DinusI is false)[<!--Do nothing-->] (if:$MisfitF is true)[(clickreplace:?MisfitF)[|Kami>["No, master. You can mate with whoever you wish. I...won't lie, I am a little jealous, Master. I love you, unconditionally. But it is your life, your choices. I just hope that you don't begin to trust people like this...Misfit."]]](elseif:$MisfitF is false)[<!--Do nothing-->] (if:$inv contains "Magister's Dirk")[(clickreplace:?Dirk)[|Kami>["The Magister's Dirk is a thrusting dagger that was blessed by the Forest God himself. It's designed for people like you, Master, to help them hone their abilties. Although...I do not know why you did not have one when I found you. All Magisters are given one."]]](else:)[<!--Do Nothing--!>] (if:$Relationship is "Hans")[(clickreplace:?Rela)[|Kami>["Hans is an admirable, and admittedly endearing Blacksmith, Master. I am glad that the two of you get along so well."]]](elseif:$Relationship is "Wyatt")[(clickreplace:?Rela)[|Kami>["Wyatt is an honorable man. I can sense that he will do right by you."]]](elseif:$Relationship is "Misfit")[(clickreplace:?Rela)[|Kami>["I was not convinced at first. It is your life, and I would not stand in the way of what you desired, but I'll admit I did not like him. However, he has proven himself a gentleman, despite the odd sordid comment."]]](else:)[<!--Do Nothing--!>] (clickreplace:?Pet)[|Kami>["I'm glad to be with you too, master."] He says, and you give him a loving pet.] (clickreplace:?IOD)[|Kami>["The Isle is a very lovely place. Erel is especially kind and all the Dragons are so...enhusiastic.]] } (link-goto: "Return", (history:)'s last) (enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Coin Pouch] A small bag containing the common currency amongst Orbath residents. They are Coins that are primarily bronze, but plated with gold to give it a shiny sheen. You currently own $coin.<br/>(if:$FountV is false)[You make your way closer to the massive fountain in the centre of the vast square. The square itself has got to be at least 50 metres from corner to corner, since the fountain itself is a stunning 10 metres wide, and there was still plenty of room to move. As you make your way closer to the fountain, you find it easier to inspect the more intricate details. (if:$DN is "day")[The sun shining overhead makes it easier for you to see the details.](elseif:$DN is "night")[It's hard to see in the moonlight, but you can just about make it out.] The entire edge of the fountain is, first and foremost, completely lined with benches, where people could sit. They seemed to have seams in them where they could be split apart, but it was otherwise a complete, full circle. From that was the base of the fountain, engraved with tiny cherubs in a repeating pattern all the way around. The rim of the fountain was thick and flat enough to sit something on, and the water in the surrounding main part of the fountain glittered in the (if:$DN is "day")[sunlight.](elseif:$DN is "night")[moonlight.] The main centrepiece of the fountain was a number of different tiers. The bottom was sculpted to look like a mountain of bones that was mashed into a wide 'patty', with a flat top. On top of that sat a sea of angels standing on the outer rim, holding trumpets, in which each was spouting water. In the middle was a replica of the Silver Spire sculpted in marble, and 4 people stood surrounding it. Each wore a crown, and you can only assume they are the previous Kings. It's...beautiful.(set:$FountV to true)](elseif:$FountV is true)[You make your way closer to the massive fountain in the centre of the vast square. It's as you remember, and nothing's changed. Kami follows along behind you obediently.] (if:$DN is "day")[It's $DN time, and the fountain is alive with people moving to and fro, from merchants, to adventurers, even to magicians and slaves alike. A number of them sit around the fountain and converse, whilst other meet people and head off. You're not sure what to even do here: it feels very much like a place to commute and talk, but there's no-one here you know. It's kind of scary, actually. [[Try and make some friends.->FountD1]] [[Take a seat.->FountD2]] [[Leave.->Hub]] (if:$WyattMet is false)[<!--Do nothing--!>](elseif:$WyattMet is true)[[[Talk to Wyatt.->Wyatt2]]]](elseif:$DN is "night")[It's $DN time, and the fountain is quiet. The water trickles, even when everyone seems to be gone. The moonlight glitters off the water's surface. Looks like there's barely anyone here, but a lone, hooded figure sits not too far away. Kami shakes his Wolf head at you, trying to silently plead not to approach him. [[Approach the figure.->FountN1]] [[Leave.->Hub]]]You make your way across the room and stand in front of the Innkeeper. (if:$innsc is 0)[The Innkeeper is a large, rather well-built bear, with a beautiful white coat of fur and a rather bulky frame. He towers over most of the residents, looking to be at least 8 foot tall, maybe even more. He leans over the counter and stares down at you, and you feel mildly intimidated. Then, suddenly, he smiles. "Welcome, friend. You must be new: I'm Dinus, the Innkeeper of the 'Cock and Pig'. Pleasure to make your acquaintance. What can I do you for?" You were mildly surprised by the Bear's mannerisms, but he seemed nice enough for you to want to talk to him a little more, or at least rent a room out. [["I'd like to rent a room."->InnStayPay]]](elseif:$innsc is 1)[You say hello to Dinus, the Innkeeper, and he seems to recognise you. A wide smile spreads across his face. "Howdy, kid. Oh, what's your name?" You tell him you are called $name. "Mighty fine name, $name. What can I do you for?" [["I'd like to rent a room."->InnStayPay]]](elseif:$innsc is >=2 and <=5)[You say hello to Dinus, and he grins down at you, recognising you. He sets down the glass he was shining, and leans over the counter. "$name, right? Howdy, kid. What can I do for you?" [["I'd like to rent a room."->InnStayPay]]](elseif:$innsc is >=6 and <=10)[You wave over to the Innkeeper, Dinus, and he beams down at you, shining off a glass and setting it on the counter. "$name, hey! And your little doggy friend, too. How's it going? What can I do you for?" [[Ask Dinus a bit more about himself.->DinusI]] [["I'd like to rent a room."->InnStayPay]]](elseif:$innsc is >=11)[You wave over to Dinus, and he beams down at him, gesturing you over. "Hey, $name! Good to see you around here again. I've been seeing quite a bit of you. Hope you're doing fine. Oh, and your buddy, too." The bear happily grins down at the pair of you, and even Kami seems rather pleased. "What'll it be today?" [[Ask to hang out with Dinus for a while.->DinusSS1]] [[Ask Dinus a bit about himself.->DinusI]] [["I'd like to rent a room."->InnStayPay]]]The Bounty Board in front of you is packed with leaflets and bits of parchment, detailing out quests. Some of them are decreed by dukes and the like, whilst others are just from poor peasants who need help with something, or someone. Almost all of them follow the same format. It lists the name of the client, what they need help with, and the reward is written larger underneath. (if:$MQ1D is 1)[<!--Do nothing--!>](else:)[Above it all is a rather large piece of parchment that looks fresher and newer than the rest, with a royal insignia stamped onto the top. [[King's Decree: Slay the Wild Animals. (Reward of 500 Gold)->MQ1]]] (if:(history:) contains "SQ1E")[You have completed this quest.](else:)[[[Village of Streamdale: Evict the Dragon. (Reward of 100 Gold)->SQ1]]] (if:(history:) contains "SQ2E")[You have completed this quest.](else:)[[[Merchant Axedull: Evict the Wolf Pack. (Reward of 200 Gold)->SQ2]]] [[Return.->HubInn]]You ask to rent a room, and the Innkeeper, Dinus, seems happy to oblige you. "One night is 10 gold, as usual." (if:$coin is <=9)[You search your pockets, but you just don't have the funds to afford a room. Dinus smiles apologetically, and rubs the back of his furred head. "Ah...sorry, kid. My hands are tied. I need the coin." You understand, sort of. You'll find the money, somehow. [[Return back to the main Inn's interior->HubInn]]](elseif:$coin is >=10)[You reach into your pockets, and retrieve the 10 coins necessary for a room. Dinus happily grins as you as you slide the coins over the table towards him, and he retrieves a small silver key from under the desk.(set:$RN to (random:1,10))(set:$coin to $coin - 10) "Room $RN, upstairs and down the hall." Dinus tells you, and you thank him, whilst taking the key. [[Head Upstairs.->InnStayRoom]]]Dinus seems like a nice man. Kind of like a father figure, and he's always been quite kind to you. You ask him about himself, and he seems quite open to talk to you. "You want to know about old Dinus, huh? Well, alright. Buckle up." He grinned, and leant down, lifting you up to sit on the bar next to him. There were no stools to sit on, after all. "I used to be an adventurer," He began. "Pretty damn good at it, too. Did you know I slayed a Dragon, once? But that was a long time ago. I kind of, uh...ended up seeing something that changed my life forever." Curious, you ask him what it was about, and he grimaces. "Warlock drug ring. They were literally injecting modified Mana into their veins...most of them were either too high to realise what they were doing, or were in a near-comatose state. One of them thought he was growing flowers in a field. Actually, he was spreading fire in a small village, and didn't realise it. They were all addicts...the King was looking for people to rid the world of them. The council wasn't intervening. So, a few mercenaries, including me, took up the cause." "It was, uh...brutal. Shocking, actually. We'd killed quite a few, sure, but we found one...he was in the Forest of Madness." Nervously, you glance to Kami, who stared up at the bear with an intensity unlike anything you'd ever seen. [[Continue.->DinusI2]](if:$innsc is 0)[You head upstairs and down the hall to your room number. You pause outside Room $RN, and you turn to Kami, giving him a nervous smile. You slip the key into the lock and open it up. The room is quaint. There is a window opposite you that looks out onto the couryard below, and a bed sits to your left. There is an end table opposite it that you can place any of your gear on, and the bed at least looks marginally comfortable. Kami trots around the room and hops up onto his back legs to peer out of the window. |Kami>["What would you like to do, Master $name?"] Kami asks you, turning towards you. (link:"Rest for the $DN.")[(set:$DN to $DNO)(set:$DNO to $DNO2)(set:$DNO2 to $DN)(goto:"InnStaySleep")] [[Ask Kami for sex.->KamiSS1]] [[Change Kami's Equipment.->HolsteinKEquip]] (if:$pk is >=1)[[[Experiment with your powers on Kami.->KamiExp1]]]](elseif:$innsc is >=1)[You head upstairs and wander down to hall to your room number, remember it from the last time you were here. You stop outside Room $RN and slip the key into the lock. You twist it, and step inside. All the rooms are the same, so you're unsurprised to find a Bed, a small table to place your things, and a window showing the street below. Kami seems just as familiar with the abode and settles down on the bed, tilting his head at you. |Kami>["What would you like to do, Master $name?"] Kami asks you. Wolves are great hunters, and I've heard White Wolves are incredibly rare." Wyatt certainly seems to know what he's talking about, and you ask him about Holstein, and what you need to know to survive. "Oh, new around here too?" He seems to understand your need for knowledge. "Holstein can be a little treacherous. You're fine around this plaza, but try to avoid alleys and back streets. They're prone to house the, uh...//unruly// people of the city." You understand. Wyatt reaches up to pat you on the head, before he stands. "I'm gonna grab an ale. If you ever need to talk about this place, I'm usually around. Just hit me up, okay?" You hold him to that.(set:$WyattMet to true) [[Leave.->Hub]](if:$Relationship is "Wyatt")[You head over to Wyatt, who's lounging around the benches surrounding the Fountain. He sees you approaching and grins. He grabs you and tugs you into his lap, and you settle in against his warm, enoying his company for a moment. Some might have looked at you with a degree of disdain, but it was innocent enough. Hell, you might even look related. Maybe. "Hey babe." He smirks. [[Spend some time with Wyatt.->WyattRHub]] [["What can you tell me about the Silver Spire?"->Wyatt2c1]] [["Can you tell me more about yourself?"->Wyatt2c2]] [["Do you know where I can earn more coins?"->Wyatt2c3]] [["Are there any places I should avoid?"->Wyatt2c4]] [[Say Goodbye.->HubFount]]](else:)[(if:$WyattBU is true)[You head over to the fountain, and you can see Wyatt sitting there, looking a little sorry for himself. You decide it's probably best not to bother him, else he might get upset. [[Leave.->Hub]]](else:)[You head over to Wyatt, who's lounging around the benches surrounding the Fountain. He sees you approaching and grins over at you. "Yo, Wolf kid! What can I do for you?" [(if:(history:) contains "WyattSSE")[[[Ask Wyatt something important.->WyattR]]](else:)[<!--Do Nothing--!>]] [["What can you tell me about the Silver Spire?"->Wyatt2c1]] [["Can you tell me more about yourself?"->Wyatt2c2]] [["Do you know where I can earn more coins?"->Wyatt2c3]] [["Are there any places I should avoid?"->Wyatt2c4]] [[Say Goodbye.->HubFount]]]](enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Magic Flower] (if:$FlowN is 1)[A rare reagent for alchemy, this is a strange flower can that only be created by a Wizard with purity of heart, which is apparently rare. It has white petals that end in hues of purple, and it never wilts.](else:)[A strange flower, created out of thin air by a young girl you met at the Fountain, in exchange for petting your dog. You have no idea what it does, but it never seems to wilt. It's petals are a pristine white and end in hues of purple.]<br/>"The Silver Spire?" Wyatt rubs his chin, thinking about what might be the best way to put it. "People have said it was built a long, long time ago by mages, but I dunno if that's true or not," He began. "But now, the Iron Empire commands all it's units from there. The King, **Adalrico Dominus**, resides at the top of the Spire, guarded by god knows how many people." That seemed relatively simple enough, but why was it so special? You had to ask. "I don't know, honestly. But...you see how it always seems to shine? It's got to mean something, I'm sure." Wyatt pointed out, and you had to agree with him. It's practically blinding when the sun hit it, and was still well illuminated by the moonlight at night. It was strange. Regardless, you were pleased with the information. [["Can you tell me more about yourself?"->Wyatt2c2]] [["Do you know where I can earn more coins?"->Wyatt2c3]] [["Are there any places I should avoid?"->Wyatt2c4]] [[Say Goodbye.->HubFount]]Wyatt seemed like a nice fellow. It'd be nice to know where he came from, even if it wasn't that important. "Me?" Wyatt blinked at you when you asked him the question, surprised. "I, well, uh..." He seemed embarrassed at talking about himself. Maybe he had something to hide. Or, maybe, you just caught him off guard. "I'm just a mercenary. Been doing odd jobs since I was 16. Before that? I was a farmhand in Trystvale, just north of here. If my parents would see me now, they'd probably flip." You got the impression that Wyatt was a lot younger than you thought. Just in case, you asked how old he was. "Haha, no filter on you, huh kid?" The Canine grinned toothily in your direction. "I'm 22." That made sense, but it was kind of sad to hear that he hadn't seen his parents for 6 years. Then again, he could have. You didn't ask: talking about parents more and more made you yearn for your own, wherever they were. [["What can you tell me about the Silver Spire?"->Wyatt2c1]] [["Do you know where I can earn more coins?"->Wyatt2c3]] [["Are there any places I should avoid?"->Wyatt2c4]] [[Say Goodbye.->HubFount]]Wyatt's face darkened a little when you asked about money, but it wasn't for what you thought. "There are a few people around here who would more than happily ask you to do some //unspeakable// things for coin, kid. Make sure you tell them no." You're momentarily startled by the sudden change in tone, but Wyatt lightened up rather quickly. His change in mood left you caught off-guard. "Besides that, ask around! There's a couple of people around here always seeking errand boys or something else. I wouldn't suggest the bounty board, even if the money's good: you're a bit too young to go on quests, slaying Ogres and Dragons. Leave that to the grown ups." You resented that, but Wyatt was also right: you have no combat experience, and your 'Magister' powers weren't exactly up to scratch. Running errands seemed easy enough, anyway. [["What can you tell me about the Silver Spire?"->Wyatt2c1]] [["Can you tell me more about yourself?"->Wyatt2c2]] [["Are there any places I should avoid?"->Wyatt2c4]] [[Say Goodbye.->HubFount]]"Places to avoid? Hmm...for sure, the alleyways. All the //horrible// people in Holstein sit around in there. Otherwise, everywhere else is decent." "Oh. Try not to venture too close to the Silver Spire. Spies from Adplagam have been trying to get in there for a while and the guards are itching to beat someone to a pulp on the grounds of being a spy. I don't think they're above abusing a kid." Wyatt rubbed his chin as he tried to think of anything else, but nothing was coming to mind. "Oh, night time," He snapped his fingers. "Try to stay indoors. All the weird people lurk at night. It's creepy." You get the gist, and thank him for the information. [["What can you tell me about the Silver Spire?"->Wyatt2c1]] [["Can you tell me more about yourself?"->Wyatt2c2]] [["Do you know where I can earn more coins?"->Wyatt2c3]] [[Say Goodbye.->HubFount]](if:$RatD is false)[Reluctantly, you agree to his demands, and the Rat seemed rather pleased with your agreement. "Great, great! Alright, come closer, closer..." You slowly step a step forward, and the Rat's dexterous fingers toy with the hem of your tunic for a moment, before he reaches into the cloak. You hold your breath for a moment, and relax with he retrieved a bottle-necked vial, with a bulbous, circular bottom. He slips his hand back under the very short, skirt-like hem of your tunic and fiddles with the waistline of your cloth pants. He seems oddly deft with his fingers, and you suddenly feel you pants loosen. //Very// deft. Your pants fall to the floor, and you hear Kami snort. You can only assume he's not happy with this at all, and he trots to the right, taking a seat nearby. He doesn't take his eyes off you. "Ah...such a delightful little thing. You should be proud." The Rat cackles, before getting into position. (if:$fcock is "flaccid cock")[The Ratman slips a finger around your small, flaccid humanoid member, and fiddles with the foreskin for a moment, before he slips the end into the tube of the vial. "Whenever you're ready."](elseif:$fcock is "sheath")[The Ratman grabs your sheath firmly and forcibly angles it. You can tell he's done before, and it didn't sting as you'd expect. He tilted the vial a bit and slipped it over your $fcock. "Whenever you're ready."](elseif:$fcock is "cloaca")[The Ratman slides a finger along your cloaca, making you shudder, before he plunges the vial's lip right against it, making sure to cover the main center. "Whenever you're ready."](elseif:$fcock is "slit")[The Ratman slides a finger along your slit, making you shudder, before he plunges the vial's lip right against it, making sure to cover the main center. "Whenever you're ready."] With a small gulp, you release yourself, relaxing your muscles. You can feel it coming, slowly, until a tiny dribble escapes your $fcock. The Ratman can tell you're nervous, but patiently waits for you to relax more. After a moment, you release again, and finally, a steady stream shoots down into the vial. "Yeah...that's it." $Ratman holds the vial with one hand as he spreads his cloak apart a little, and you catch a glimpse of his erect, humanoid cock in the light. He's vigorously stroking his erection as you urinate into the vial. You want to stop, but you're almost done now. Slowly, the trickle begins to die down, and you hear the Rat desperately groans in pleasure. His cock pulses and throbs, and you can see strands of cum shooting from the end of his dick in the moonlight, and it just barely misses your foot by an inch. He sighs in pleasure and slides his hand away, eventually taking the vial away from your $fcock and corking it, sliding it into his cloak. "Thanks, kid." He grins, and you get the impression this was for more than just the urine. He delves into his pocket and pulls out the coins, dropping them into your hand. (set:$coin to $coin + 20)(set:$RatD to true) You thank him and get dressed. [[Leave.->HubFount]]](elseif:$RatD is true)[Reluctantly, you agree to his demands, and the Rat seemed rather pleased with your agreement. "Great, great! Alright, come closer, closer..." You slowly step a step forward, and the Rat's dexterous fingers toy with the hem of your tunic for a moment, before he reaches into the cloak. You hold your breath for a moment, and... $Ratman frowns, rummaging around his cloak. "Fuck," He spits out. "My vials are full. Sorry, kid. Come back tomorrow night, when I've got more empty ones." You understand, you think. [[Leave.->HubFount]]]You make your way through the crowd, with Kami behind you, and eventually stop beside a wide stand strewn with magical items. "Am, come forth, come forth!" The woman running the stand is a hobbled, desperate, and clearly poor Lizard, covered in mottled green scales with a scarf over her baldhead. She sticks a forked tongue out at you as she gestures to her wares. Curiously, you look down at them. The table is strewn with a variety of different tools and implements. Honestly, you have no idea what some of them are, or what they do, but she seems fairly adamant in their quality. As you look over them, she rambles continually about how they are the finest goods around. Each one is labelled with a price in gold. (if:$inv contains "Silver Orb")[You have already purchased the Silver Orb.](else:)[|Orb>[Purchase a Silver Orb. (20 gold)](if:$coin is >=20)[(clickreplace:?Orb)[You purchased the Silver Orb. The stall owner beams her crooked teeth in your direction.(set:$inv to $inv + (a:"Silver Orb"))(set:$coin to $coin - 20)]](elseif:$coin is <20)[(clickreplace:?Orb)[You cannot afford this. The stall owner grimaces at you.]]] (if:$inv contains "Ruby Necklace")[You have already purchased the Ruby Necklace.](else:)[|Necklace>[Purchase a Ruby Necklace. (50 gold)](if:$coin is >=50)[(clickreplace:?Necklace)[You purchased the Ruby Necklace. The stall owner beams her crooked teeth in your direction.(set:$inv to $inv + (a:"Ruby Necklace"))(set:$coin to $coin - 50)]](elseif:$coin is <50)[(clickreplace:?Necklace)[You cannot afford this. The stall owner grimaces at you.]]] (if:$inv contains "Dog Collar")[You have already purchased the Dog Collar.](else:)[|Collar>[Purchase a Dog Collar. (30 gold)](if:$coin is >=30)[(clickreplace:?Collar)[You purchased the Dog Collar. The stall owner beams her crooked teeth in your direction.(set:$inv to $inv + (a:"Dog Collar"))(set:$coin to $coin - 30)]](elseif:$coin is <30)[(clickreplace:?Collar)[You cannot afford this. The stall owner grimaces at you.]]] (if:$inv contains "Magic Flower")[[[Ask about the Magic Flower->MarkMagicF1]]](else:)[<!--Do Nothing--!>] [[Leave.->HubMarket]]You make your way through the crowd of people and manage to worm your way through to a stall that seems to be selling herbal ingredients and potions. "Ah, hello young man! Looking for something to renew your vigor?" A slimly built, but clearly quite old Feline smiled at you over her sagging bust, and you glance down at what she has avaiable. The stall is packed with potions that seem to sport a variety of different colours, and a number of bundled leaves and flowers laid next to one-another. There's so much here that you're not even sure what to begin with. "Maybe you need something to impress the ladies, hmm? You look about...$age?" She grinned, placing a finger on a bottle near her, with a golden hue. "For a handsome $species like yourself, I can definitely reccommend this." (if:(history:) contains "EPFuck2")[You're fairly certain the woman doesn't remember you. You quietly point out that you have purchased the potion before, and that it almost killed you. She pales for a moment, before shrugging. "Sorry Darlin'. Didn't know." Bitch.](else:)[Kami snorts beside you, and you glance to him. He gives you a look that tells you you really don't need to be scammed by some old cat. He's probably right, but still, there might be something here you can use.] (if:$inv contains "Endowment Potion")[You have already purchased the Endowment Potion.](elseif:(history:) contains "EPFuck2")[The woman has more 'Endowment Potions' to sell. You're not buying it again.](else:)[|EP>[Purchase the Endowment Potion. (50 gold)](if:$coin is >=50)[(clickreplace:?EP)[You purchased the golden Endowment Potion. Kami shakes his head in disappointment.(set:$inv to $inv + (a:"Endowment Potion"))(set:$coin to $coin - 50)]](elseif:$coin is <50)[(clickreplace:?EP)[You cannot afford this item. Kami blows a sigh of relief, and the stall owner looks disappointed.]]] (if:$inv contains "Health Potion")[You have already purchased the Health Potion.](else:)[|HP>[Purchase the Health Potion. (20 gold)](if:$coin is >=20)[(clickreplace:?HP)[You purchased the Health Potion. The stall owner seems pleased, and hands it over.(set:$inv to $inv + (a:"Health Potion"))(set:$coin to $coin - 20)]](elseif:$coin is <20)[(clickreplace:?HP)[You cannot afford this item. The stall owner looks disappointed.]]] (if:$inv contains "Pain Leaves")[You have already purchased the Pain Leaves.](else:)[|PL>[Purchase a bunch of Pain Leaves (20 gold)](if:$coin is >=20)[(clickreplace:?PL)[You purchased the bundle of Pain Leaves. The stall owner seems pleased.(set:$inv to $inv + (a:"Pain Leaves"))(set:$coin to $coin - 20)]](elseif:$coin is <50)[(clickreplace:?PL)[You cannot afford this item. The stall owner looks disappointed.]]] [[Leave.->HubMarket]]You make your way towards the far back of the Marketplace, with Kami bringing up the rear, and you move in between the stalls towards the small meeting place for the Travelling Peddlers. There are a number of people here looking to buy wares, and a great many looking to sell, too. Nearly every single one of them has a rather massive backpack that they've emptied out onto a small blanket. (if:$PeddlerV is false)[You're not even sure where to begin, or who to talk to, and Kami sits beside you with a similar expression on his face. The pair of you are lost. "Yo! Hey there!" A voice called to you, and you turned to see a Raccoon hunched over a blanket filled with various goods that primarily seemed to be weapons, of varying types. "Uh, forgive me," He began as you approached. "You seem to be lacking a weapon. It's not good to wander around without one: could turn nasty, you see! I have some for sale. You should buy one." You look over the weapons and glance to Kami, who looks at you with an unrecognisable gaze. You're not sure if you should, but it might be wise to defend yourself in the event your powers don't work to your liking. None of these weapons seem fitting for you, however; they are all too large or unwieldly for you to comfortably use. Something draws your eye though, amongst the pile of weaponry. It's calling to you. [[Continue.->MarkPed2]]](elseif:$inv contains "Magister's Dirk")[You spot the Peddler from before, and he waves at you. You wave back, and realise quite quickly that there's nothing else here for you. With regret, you turn and walk back out into the Marketplace. Kami follows along behind you. [[Leave.->HubMarket]]](elseif:$PeddlerV is true)[You spot the Peddler you met before, the Raccoon, who's sitting in amongst his wares, and you go on over, much to Kami's encouragement. "Oh, hey!" He seems to recognise you, and gestures to the wares below him. "Take your pick, kid. You'll need a weapon to protect yourself." Once again, your eye is drawn to the dagger sitting amongst the pile, and Kami openly whines in your ear. [[Coninue.->MarkPed2]]]You remember the Flower that that strange girl gave you. If this person is a seller of magical items, then she should surely know, or are able to detect, magical items. Anxiously, you take the unwilting flower from your pocket and show it to the woman, asking her what it is. She stares at the flower for a moment, before her gaze snaps to you. "May I?" She holds out a hand, and you hand it to her. She openly turns it over in her hands, studying the flower, before she hands it back to you moments later. At least she's not trying to steal it. "A flower that never wilts," She hissed out, her slitted eyes blinking. "An expensive reagent in alchemy, because they can only be created by Wizards who are pure of heart, which are...rare." She cackles at her own joke, before clearing her throat, leaning forwards over the stall a little. You can see the stall creak under her weight. "100 gold for it." You're surprised it's so expensive, but it also holds a little bit of sentimental value, both for you and for Kami. Should you sell it?(set:$FlowN to 1) |FlowerS>[Sell the flower.](clickreplace:?FlowerS)[(set:$coin to $coin + 100)(set:$inv to $inv - (a:"Magic Flower"))You hand the Flower over, and the reptillian woman takes 100 coins out of her purse, depositing them into yours. She grins at you, and you thank her.] [[Leave.->HubMarket]](enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Silver Orb] A strange Silver Orb you bought at the market. It seems to glow dimly, but otherwise, you have no idea what it's for.<br/>(enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Dog Collar] A black collar with a silver buckle. You can tell it's teeming with magical energy, but Kami refuses to let you put it on him. He's wary about what propeties it might hold, and similarly, so are you.<br/>(enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Ruby Necklace] A strange gold-plated Necklace with a Ruby cabochon, with a faceted edge, and set into a gold-plated housing. It reflects the light perfectly, and your Magister powers allow you to feel the energy pusling within it. Otherwise, you no idea what it's for.<br/>(enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Pain Leaves] A bunch of special herbs. You're not sure how you know what they do, but if you chew them at the right moment, you'll dull any pain you receive. It won't save you from broken bones and cuts, though.<br/>(enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Health Potion] A common potion in and around Orbath, this specially brewed potion heals wounds and speeds up regenaration for a short period of time. Might come in handy.<br/>(enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Endowment Potion] A potion bought from an old lady in Holstein's Market. It has a delightfully golden hue, and you were promised to 'impress the ladies' with this potion. (if:$Location is "IoD")[You have a feeling drinking it right now is a bad idea.](else:)[Do you want to [[drink it?->EPFuck]]]<br/>Against Kami's better judgement, and take a swig of the 'Endowment Potion', that's said to impress the ladies and give you better sexual prowess. The potion tastes like urine. It has the texture of urine. For a moment, you're pretty sure you just bought a vial of pee, and drank it. Nothing happens for what feels like 10 seconds. Then, your entire body hums, and not in a good way. You feel as if every fibre of your being is being torn apart, and you keel over, falling to the floor. Kami is alarmed and barks out, seeking some sort of aid, hoping someome might come to the rescue. You're greeted to the sight of large metal boots, before everything fades out... [[Continue.->EPFuck2]](if:$PeddlerV is false)[You ask the peddler what it is, and he appears rather surprised at your question, digging out within the pile of weaponry and holding it up to you. The weapon is small, like a dagger. The blade it only 4 inches in length and remarkably thin, from base to it's tip. The tip curves slightly into a point on both sides. The blade itself is hidden in it's scabbard, which is engraved with pictures of wolves and woodland creatures. The hilt is fat and banded, and the scabbard sports two rings to attach it to a belt. "You know, in all the years I've had this, no-one has ever picked it out." The peddler seems amazed that you even chose it, and he unsheaths the blade for you to it. It's pristine and silver, practically blinding you at the right angle. You can see that the thin blade itself is engraved too, with a similar design. Suddenly, you feel a butting against your leg. Kami is nosing desperately into your side, whining and patting his front paws against the ground. He seems incredibly worked up, and it's no coincidence that he's doing this now. The Dagger must be important. "Wow, your Dog's pretty lively, huh? Must need a walk." The peddler was completely blind to what Kami actually was, before he set the dagger down. "This thing? Pff, no-one's wanted it for years, but part of me didn't want to let it go. For you? 10 gold, that's all I ask." [[Purchase the Dagger.->MarkPed22]] [[Decline.->MarkPed23]]](elseif:$PeddlerV is true)[Once again, the Raccoon takes the blade out from the pile and turns it over in his hand. Just like last time, you feel physically drawn to the blade, and you can't help but feel that you need it, somehow. It's like it's calling to you. Kami can't seem to sit still next to you, desperate to tell you to purchase it, but knowing better than to openly speak in public and be seen for what he is. "Your dog clearly wants you to have this. Same as before, kid. 10 gold, and it's yours." [[Purchase the Dagger.->MarkPed22]] [[Decline.->MarkPed23]]]You agree to purchase to dagger, much to Kami's excitement, who taps his front paws into the ground and snorts through his nose. "Excellent." The Raccoon seems pleased to part with it, and you take out 10 gold coins from your Coin Purse, handing them over to him. In return, he gives you the dagger.(set:$coin to $coin - 10)(set:$inv to $inv + (a:"Magister's Dirk")) As soon as the blade reaches your hands, you feel a sudden rush of power that makes you dizzy. The entire world suddenly seems heightened: You can hear birds on the rooftops, the murmuring of voices from far away, the sweat dripping down a person's head. Kami nudges into your side and you're brought back to reality. You look down at him, and your eyes bulge at the sight. He is surrounding in an otherworldly glow, pristine and white, like a symbol of purity. Kami seems pleased with your expression, but you're afraid. You quickly thank the Raccoon and turn, heading back out towards the Marketplace, and through back towards the hub, your head reeling from the sudden surge of power. |Kami>["Master. $name. Concentrate."] Kami's words bring you back, and you duck into a more secure location so the two of you can talk. You drop the dagger to the floor for the moment, and the power fades, bringing you back to your senses. |Kami>["Master, this blade is a Magister's Dirk. They are a thrusting dagger, designed specifically for people like you. They heighten your abilities. What you felt just now, what you saw...it's what you could be in the future."] That's frightening.(set:$PeddlerV to true) [[Continue.->Hub]]You quietly decline the purchase of the dagger, and Kami whines in earnest beside you. He is desperate for you to purchase this thing, and you're unsure of it. "Hey, no problem. Just come back later, alright? You can buy it then. I'll be around." You agree and turn, walking away. |Kami>["That dagger is more important than you know, Master. Please, when you can, purchase it from the peddler. I can tell you more once you've acquired it."](set:$PeddlerV to true) [[Leave.->HubMarket]](enchant: ?u, (text-style:'underline')) |u>[Magister's Dirk] A royal blade that belongs specifically to Magisters, those called upon to take up the Mantle by the Forest God, Pan. These special Dirks are thrusting daggers, and have an inherently magical property that boosts the effectiveness of a Magister's abilities. You were lucky to find this in Holstein.<br/>You didn't even dream whilst you were out. Everything was a blank, like someone had wiped you completely clean. It was odd...scary, even. It felt like an eternity. You finally feel your muscles coming back to you, slowly, and you begin to wake up. You feel pain, excrutiating pain unlike anything you've ever felt before. You're in the Holstein Inn, the Cock and Pig, at least you think so. The ceiling looks wooden, and when you turn your head, you can see the Square from the window. You hear a whimper to your left, and turn your head to see Kami laying next to you. He looks positively relieved that you're safe, and he buries his head up against your chest, his tail wagging to and fro. "He's not left your side since you fell unconscious." (if:(history:) contains "InnStay")[You turn your head to see Dinus, the Innkeeper, getting up from a chair, crossing across the room to stand over your bed with a relieved smile. "Glad to see you're okay, kid. (if:$location is "Scarhaven")[The people in Scarhaven brought you here after you collapsed.](elseif:$Location is "IoD")[Big winged creatures dropped you here, for some reason.](else:)[You had me worried.]" He sighs out.](else:)[You turn your head to see a rather heavily-built Bear, with white fur and wearing citizen's clothes, rising up from a chair. He crosses the room to lean over your bed. "I'm glad to see you're alright. I'm Dinus, by the way. I own the Inn. (if:$location is "Scarhaven")[The people in Scarhaven brought you here after you collapsed.](elseif:$Location is "IoD")[Big winged creatures dropped you here, for some reason.](else:)[<!--Do Nothing--!>] Heard your dog barking and came running." He sighs out.] "Just...rest as long as you need to, okay? Free of charge. I don't want you dying on me, kid. Can't have that on my conscience." He heads towards the door now that you're awake, and you weakly slide a hand over Kami's back, stroking him. "I don't want you out of that bed until you're well, you hear me?" Dinus points a finger at you, before he heads out, closing the door behind him. Kami doesn't say a word, and he doesn't need to. You know never to do that again.(set:$inv to $inv - (a:"Endowment Potion"))(set:$Location to "Holstein") [[Get up and leave.->Hub]]Against your better judgement, you decide that wandering around the back streets of Holstein might turn up something interesting, for once. As you're making your way around, you spot a small alleyway, and decide to sneak into it. Kami lets out a snort, glancing around as he pads along beside you, clearly a little uneasy in such narrow areas, where both you and he could be easily ambushed. The alleyway is dim, but the light from the streets on either side at least illuminates it a little for you, though the hanging balconies and exaggerated roofs overhead shield all light from above. You spot a hooded a figure, squatting down in the alley, and you step a little closer, a bit anxious. (if:$RatV is false)[The figure turns it's head towards you, and you're greeted to the sight a relatively dirty-looking Ratman. His fur looks to be a mixture of grey and blue, but it looks a bit shabby and dirty. The cloak covers the majority of his body, but it's quite clearly tucked up, revealing that his lower half is entirely naked. He has one hand on his dick, urinating right in the middle of the alleyway. You're mildly disgusted. "Oh," He snorts and rubs his nose as the remnants of his urination die down, and he slowly gets to his feet, making sure to step around the puddle of pee. He covers himself up again. "Uh...Nothin' to see here, kid. Get goin'." He gestured for you to leave, and you're glad to, feeling a bit grossed out. Ratman are notorious for their treachery, and you don't want to be tricked. [[Leave.->Hub]]](elseif:$Ratman is "Misfit")[(if:$Relationship is "Misfit")[You quickly realise it's just Misfit, and your heart soars at the sight of him. He seems to be doing his usual: emptying his bladder against the stone wall, before he spots you, and a grin spreads across his face. "$name! Glad to see you back, buddy." He shakes off the last of his stream, before bounding towards him, wrapping you up in a hug. Kami snorts his disapproval. "Oh, and your dog, 'course." He reaches to pet Kami's head and hesitates, before he eventually ruffles the Wolf's head. Kami looks complacent, for now, his tail wagging a bit. "You wanna hang out?" Misfit asks, almost pleadingly. Wyatt seemed pleased, and he gets to his feet, crossing across the small kitchen as you slide into a seat opposite where he was sitting. You crane your body around to watch him spooning soup into a bowl from a large ladle, before putting more into a second bowl. You begin to wonder why at first, but it becomes readily apparent rather quickly. "Can't just go and feed you without giving your friend some food, right?" Wyatt grinned at the pair of you, placing one bowl on the table, whilst setting the other on the floor. Kami's tail frantically wags and he seems definitely rather appreciative, dipping his head and lapping at the hot soup rather happily. You stare down at the bowl in front of you.
